title: Bergen Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Bergen, with a Z-Score of -3.66. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current weather conditions in Bergen are characterized by a significant drop in temperature, with a HDD of 13.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 73%, and the wind speed is moderate at 15.8 km/h. 
 The CDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heat-related stress, but the cold temperatures pose a significant threat to various sectors.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
